aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

chapter_spine.conflict: Heat-surge intake volume, strict dispatch timing, and Marisol's need to hide recognition before the train seals.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol discovers that the estranged detainee on her line is Gabriel, loaded under Santa Avelina paperwork, and her private guilt becomes an operational emergency.
must_land_beats: Open inside the bodily labor of making deportation look sanitary.
Show Marisol's earned competence with blackwater systems, trauma-room turnover, and intake flow.
Reveal Gabriel first through physical recognition before paperwork confirms him.
End with the train still moving toward departure and Marisol trapped inside the schedule.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Heat-surge intake volume, strict dispatch timing, and Marisol's need to hide recognition before the train seals.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol discovers that the estranged detainee on her line is Gabriel, loaded under Santa Avelina paperwork, and her private guilt becomes an operational emergency.

chapter_spine.conflict: Locked receiving-state paperwork, guarded medical access, and years of estrangement compacted into minutes.
chapter_spine.consequence: Gabriel rejects quiet rescue, names Marisol as part of the line's erasure, and turns an old family wound into active resistance.
must_land_beats: Get Gabriel into the trauma room through a plausible work pretext.
Make his bruises and confiscated recorder materially present.
Let Gabriel's anger be specific and morally coherent rather than merely filial.
Close on Marisol leaving without trust, authority, or an easy lie to tell herself.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Locked receiving-state paperwork, guarded medical access, and years of estrangement compacted into minutes.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Gabriel rejects quiet rescue, names Marisol as part of the line's erasure, and turns an old family wound into active resistance.

chapter_spine.conflict: The need to appear normal among friends while learning that official correction will not come.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol loses faith in a quiet clerical fix and steals Gabriel's recorder, moving from anxiety into clandestine action.
must_land_beats: Give the book one genuine off-duty meal with ordinary talk and fatigue.
Show Paloma and Ivo as full workers with habits, pain, humor, and private concerns.
Let the compliance call fail in language that feels coldly routine rather than melodramatically evil.
End with the recorder in Marisol's possession as the chapter's tangible pivot.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The need to appear normal among friends while learning that official correction will not come.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol loses faith in a quiet clerical fix and steals Gabriel's recorder, moving from anxiety into clandestine action.

chapter_spine.conflict: Ancestral-admissibility policy, Teresa's scrutiny, and the train's imminent southbound departure.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol learns Gabriel's case is structurally locked and realizes many other detainees are being assigned to false countries through the same mechanism.
must_land_beats: Explain ancestral admissibility only through lived paperwork pressure, not abstract exposition.
Make Teresa persuasive in institutional terms rather than cartoonishly cruel.
Have Gabriel widen the frame by handing over names linked to false-country assignments.
Leave Marisol with no lawful path except delay.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Ancestral-admissibility policy, Teresa's scrutiny, and the train's imminent southbound departure.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol learns Gabriel's case is structurally locked and realizes many other detainees are being assigned to false countries through the same mechanism.

chapter_spine.conflict: Dispatch clocks, audit trails, and the first material lie Marisol asks others to carry.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol launches sabotage through a fabricated deep-clean order, implicates Ivo, and enters a tense conditional exchange with Gabriel.
must_land_beats: Use sanitation procedure itself as the means of delay.
Show the practical inconvenience and moral ambiguity of the hold for workers and detainees alike.
Make Ivo's decision to cover feel costly and specific.
Have Gabriel insist that time without collective purpose is not enough.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Dispatch clocks, audit trails, and the first material lie Marisol asks others to carry.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol launches sabotage through a fabricated deep-clean order, implicates Ivo, and enters a tense conditional exchange with Gabriel.

chapter_spine.conflict: Night stillness, recorded testimony, and the collapse of Marisol's compartmentalization.
chapter_spine.consequence: Listening to the recorder shifts Marisol from trying to save only Gabriel to trying to keep people from disappearing unnamed.
must_land_beats: Let the recorder voices be specific enough to individualize the system's damage.
Keep the chapter physically grounded in outage heat, insects, and stalled metal.
Tie Marisol's memory of domestic life to her present work without softening either.
End on an ethical enlargement, not a tactical decision.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Night stillness, recorded testimony, and the collapse of Marisol's compartmentalization.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Listening to the recorder shifts Marisol from trying to save only Gabriel to trying to keep people from disappearing unnamed.

chapter_spine.conflict: Teresa's surprise audit, downgraded credentials, and worker fear around housing and overtime.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol loses operational cover, Gabriel is moved to higher security, and Paloma quietly crosses into complicity.
must_land_beats: Publicly strip Marisol's authority in ways that change future logistics.
Tie worker obedience to housing deductions and summer earnings.
Let Paloma's falsified chart come from care under pressure, not abstract rebellion.
End with Marisol seeing that coworkers may fear her sabotage as much as management does.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Teresa's surprise audit, downgraded credentials, and worker fear around housing and overtime.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol loses operational cover, Gabriel is moved to higher security, and Paloma quietly crosses into complicity.

chapter_spine.conflict: A biometric-rescan order, armed restraint staff, and the impossibility of neutral delay inside a crowded car.
chapter_spine.consequence: Resistance becomes collective and bloody, and Marisol learns that half-measures still leave vulnerable bodies exposed to institutional violence.
must_land_beats: Build the refusal through spatial pressure and whispered coordination rather than speeches.
Make Naila's leadership practical and observational.
Render the crackdown with physical specificity and moral confusion.
Let Gabriel articulate why delayed cruelty is still cruelty.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: A biometric-rescan order, armed restraint staff, and the impossibility of neutral delay inside a crowded car.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Resistance becomes collective and bloody, and Marisol learns that half-measures still leave vulnerable bodies exposed to institutional violence.

chapter_spine.conflict: Storm delay, old intimacy, and the economic cost sabotage will impose on allies.
chapter_spine.consequence: Ivo agrees to hear a larger plan, but Marisol fully understands that breaking the line may also break the workers who helped her survive it.
must_land_beats: Give the novel a second genuine quiet chapter with food, weather, and memory.
Let desire or old tenderness flicker without turning the book into a romance.
Make Ivo's pension and child-support pressure concrete.
Close with consent to help that is shadowed by loss.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Storm delay, old intimacy, and the economic cost sabotage will impose on allies.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Ivo agrees to hear a larger plan, but Marisol fully understands that breaking the line may also break the workers who helped her survive it.

chapter_spine.conflict: The need to prove a rumor before records are purged and the concession renews.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol uncovers the line's secondary market in medically deferred detainees and shifts her target from one rescue to the concession's profit model.
must_land_beats: Show how sanitation and medical records produce exploitable categories.
Use Naila and Gabriel's knowledge as interpretive keys rather than exposition dumps.
Make the leak feel risky, partial, and technically plausible.
End with evidence leaving company control for the first time.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The need to prove a rumor before records are purged and the concession renews.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol uncovers the line's secondary market in medically deferred detainees and shifts her target from one rescue to the concession's profit model.

chapter_spine.conflict: A narrowing timeline before quarterly reconciliation and the need to align workers, detainees, and evidence without trust.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol, Paloma, Ivo, and Gabriel convert improvisation into a collective plan built around public visibility rather than private escape.
must_land_beats: Map the actual things that can stop a train in this world.
Differentiate between failures the company can spin and failures it cannot contain.
Let Gabriel and Marisol speak honestly enough to establish terms without healing the past.
End with a plan that only works if multiple compromised people all keep their nerve.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: A narrowing timeline before quarterly reconciliation and the need to align workers, detainees, and evidence without trust.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol, Paloma, Ivo, and Gabriel convert improvisation into a collective plan built around public visibility rather than private escape.

chapter_spine.conflict: Internal surveillance, rushed transfer orders, and a sabotage attempt that depends on perfect timing.
chapter_spine.consequence: The quarantine plan backfires, an elderly detainee dies, Paloma is exposed, and Marisol's sabotage gains an irreversible human cost.
must_land_beats: Stage the pathogen gambit through procedure and timing, not melodramatic villainy.
Make the death physically and operationally legible.
Show Paloma's suspension as both bureaucratic and personal loss.
Leave Gabriel nearly unable to continue with Marisol after this failure.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Internal surveillance, rushed transfer orders, and a sabotage attempt that depends on perfect timing.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The quarantine plan backfires, an elderly detainee dies, Paloma is exposed, and Marisol's sabotage gains an irreversible human cost.

chapter_spine.conflict: A storm blackout, the temporary possibility of escape, and the truth Marisol has never admitted aloud.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol and Gabriel reach brutal honesty about the past, destroying fantasy while making genuine collaboration possible.
must_land_beats: Make the extraction feel improvised, physical, and precarious rather than slick.
Use Retiro Sur as a space of rust, memory, and stalled time.
Have Marisol name the old cover-up in full concrete terms.
End not with forgiveness but with a choice about what truth now demands.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: A storm blackout, the temporary possibility of escape, and the truth Marisol has never admitted aloud.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol and Gabriel reach brutal honesty about the past, destroying fantasy while making genuine collaboration possible.

chapter_spine.conflict: Teresa's offer of private relief for Gabriel versus Marisol's widening obligation to the unnamed.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol rejects a bargain that would save her son privately and commits instead to destroying the line in public.
must_land_beats: Make Teresa's bargain genuinely plausible and hard to refuse.
Show how private mercy is used as a management tool.
Use confiscated belongings as factual evidence of anonymous accumulation, not symbolic clutter.
Close on an active decision for public ruin.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Teresa's offer of private relief for Gabriel versus Marisol's widening obligation to the unnamed.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol rejects a bargain that would save her son privately and commits instead to destroying the line in public.

chapter_spine.conflict: Investor optics, scripted journalism, and Marisol's need to poison the performance without showing her hand too early.
chapter_spine.consequence: The institution's polished self-presentation becomes unstable, ridiculous, and vulnerable to full public rupture.
must_land_beats: Lean into absurd hospitality theater without losing the underlying cruelty.
Make each small sabotage materially petty and strategically useful.
Let the chapter embarrass power rather than offering comforting satire from above.
End with the demo already wobbling before the true rupture lands.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Investor optics, scripted journalism, and Marisol's need to poison the performance without showing her hand too early.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The institution's polished self-presentation becomes unstable, ridiculous, and vulnerable to full public rupture.

chapter_spine.conflict: Security response, timed coordination across cars, and the need to force civic visibility before management can reseal the scene.
chapter_spine.consequence: The Meridian West line is publicly broken when sewage, testimony, paperwork, and municipal jurisdiction collide in full view.
must_land_beats: Synchronize worker sabotage, detainee refusal, and evidentiary release.
Keep the action grounded in rail systems and human bodies rather than action-movie spectacle.
Make the greywater purge and public platform legally consequential.
Ensure every main accomplice pays an immediate price.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Security response, timed coordination across cars, and the need to force civic visibility before management can reseal the scene.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The Meridian West line is publicly broken when sewage, testimony, paperwork, and municipal jurisdiction collide in full view.

chapter_spine.conflict: Hospital injury, legal uncertainty, and the emotional exposure left after the line is halted.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol and Gabriel become damaged kin again, and Gabriel chooses testimony over vanishing into private safety.
must_land_beats: Show bodily and economic fallout for workers as well as detainees.
Give Marisol and Gabriel one meal with no tactical objective.
Let their conversation move through small domestic specifics rather than abstract reconciliation.
End with witness chosen as a future burden, not a triumphant banner.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Hospital injury, legal uncertainty, and the emotional exposure left after the line is halted.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol and Gabriel become damaged kin again, and Gabriel chooses testimony over vanishing into private safety.

chapter_spine.conflict: Formal inquiry, legal self-protection, and the knowledge that institutions mutate even when one concession falls.
chapter_spine.consequence: Marisol turns sabotage into witness by naming exactly how the trains were maintained and broken, while the line is stopped but not historically undone.
must_land_beats: Make the deposition precise about mechanisms, not just moral outrage.
Show the concession's loss as meaningful but partial.
Use the first rain and the rusting cars as material change, not decorative symbolism.
End on witness that resists redemption language.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Formal inquiry, legal self-protection, and the knowledge that institutions mutate even when one concession falls.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Marisol turns sabotage into witness by naming exactly how the trains were maintained and broken, while the line is stopped but not historically undone.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

premise: Across two decades of border privatization, a woman who disinfects the toilets and trauma rooms on transcontinental deportation trains works her way up to route supervisor, learning every coupling, restraint protocol, and sewage system on the line. When her estranged son is loaded aboard under a different country's paperwork, she has one season to sabotage the institution she helped keep running.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
